archetype.name: Demolitionist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Directional Bombs at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Directional Bombs
feat.special: If you have the Expanded Splash feat or another ability that increases the radius of splash damage, you can have the splash damage be a 20-foot cone.
feat.text: You can lob bombs with great force and a precise trajectory to angle the splash in a cone that sprays in a single direction, potentially allowing you to avoid allies and splash deeper into enemy lines. When throwing an alchemical bomb with the splash trait, instead of splashing all squares adjacent to the target, you can create a splash in a 15-foot cone. You choose the cone's direction, but its first square must be a square in the target's space.

traits.name: Alchemist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the alchemist class.
